title: Huawei 10G SFP+ optical transceiver, SM, 1550nm, 80km, 2x LC, DDM
description: Huawei SFP-10G-ZR is a single-mode 10G SFP+ module with a wavelength of 1550nm and two LC connectors for a connection distance of up to 80km The LC connectors in the SFP module have UPC polishing GPSR
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 10 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1550 Distance [km] 80 Transfer type 2-fiber Polishing type UPC Tx power [dBm] 0 up to 4 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 24 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
